What is she like? She is outgoing.
You mentioned a colleague you admire. What is she like?
Well, she is very reliable and patient. She never misses a deadline.
She sounds great. Is she easy to work with?
Yes. She is quite direct in meetings, but she can also be very supportive.
How long have you known her?
For about three years. The thing about her is that she is also very creative.
It sounds like you really respect her.
I do. To be honest, I would say she is the heart of our team.
My colleague is reliable and very patient.
She is creative and she always has new ideas.
What is she like? She is outgoing and supportive.
To be honest, I would say he is hardworking.

Let me tell you about my favorite colleague, Marco. He is one of the most reliable people I know. He always arrives on time, and he never forgets a deadline. The thing about Marco is that he is very patient. When a new person joins the team, he is always supportive and he helps them learn. He is quite direct in meetings, so you always know what he thinks. But he can also be very thoughtful. Last week, he stayed late to help me finish a report. To be honest, I would say he is the heart of our team.

I want to describe my younger sister, Bia. She is the most creative person in my family. She paints, she writes, and she always has a new idea. The thing about Bia is that she is very outgoing. She loves to meet new people, and she talks to everyone at a party. She is not shy at all. I am more of a quiet person, so we are quite different. But she is also very hardworking. She studies design, and she works on her projects every single day. I would say she is easygoing, but she never gives up on the things she loves.

First, this is my colleague, Marco. Second, he is very reliable and patient. Third, he usually arrives early and helps the team. Fourth, he is direct in meetings, but he is also thoughtful. Fifth, to be honest, I would say he is the best person on our team.
